flashcards.back: Distance from axis (r), angle around axis (θ), height (z).

flashcards.front: How is cylindrical different from polar?
flashcards.back: Polar is 2D (r, θ). Cylindrical adds z for height—it's 3D.
Rotating or spinning systems. Vortexes, turbines, tops.
2m from the central axis, at 45° angle, 3m height.
